allow: PowerShell($git = "C:\\Program Files\\Git\\cmd\\git.exe"; $tmp = "$env:TEMP\\csa-erp-clone"; if \(Test-Path $tmp\) { Remove-Item $tmp -Recurse -Force }; & $git clone https://github.com/fauziwildan/csa-erp.git $tmp; if \($?\) { Write-Output "CLONE_OK" })

PowerShell($tmp = "$env:TEMP\\csa-erp-clone"; $dest = "C:\\xampp\\htdocs\\csa-enterprise"; Get-ChildItem -Path $tmp -Force | ForEach-Object { Move-Item -Path $_.FullName -Destination $dest -Force }; Remove-Item $tmp -Recurse -Force; Write-Output "MOVED"; Get-ChildItem -Path $dest -Force | Select-Object Name)

PowerShell($tools = @{ "php"="C:\\xampp\\php\\php.exe"; }; foreach \($t in "php","composer","node","npm"\) { $c = Get-Command $t -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($c\) { Write-Output "$t : $\($c.Source\)" } else { Write-Output "$t : NOT FOUND" } }; Write-Output "---XAMPP PHP---"; if \(Test-Path "C:\\xampp\\php\\php.exe"\) { & C:\\xampp\\php\\php.exe -v | Select-Object -First 1 })

PowerShell($j = Get-Content composer.json | ConvertFrom-Json; Write-Output "PHP req: $\($j.require.php\)"; Write-Output "--- PATH php version ---"; php -v | Select-Object -First 1; Write-Output "--- node engines \(package.json\) ---"; $p = Get-Content package.json | ConvertFrom-Json; $p.engines)

PowerShell($dir = "$env:LOCALAPPDATA\\Composer\\bin"; New-Item -ItemType Directory -Force -Path $dir | Out-Null; php -r "copy\('https://getcomposer.org/installer', 'composer-setup.php'\);"; php composer-setup.php --install-dir="$dir" --filename=composer.phar; Remove-Item composer-setup.php -Force; Write-Output "---TEST---"; php "$dir\\composer.phar" --version)

PowerShell($npm = "C:\\Program Files\\nodejs\\npm.cmd"; if \(-not \(Test-Path $npm\)\) { Write-Output "npm not at default path"; Get-ChildItem "C:\\Program Files\\nodejs" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Name } else { & $npm install --no-audit --no-fund 2>&1 | Select-Object -Last 25; Write-Output "EXIT=$LASTEXITCODE" })

PowerShell(php artisan key:generate; Write-Output "---MYSQL PROCESS---"; Get-Process mysqld -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Name,Id; Write-Output "---PORT 3306---"; \(Test-NetConnection -ComputerName 127.0.0.1 -Port 3306 -WarningAction SilentlyContinue\).TcpTestSucceeded)

PowerShell(Start-Process -FilePath "C:\\xampp\\mysql\\bin\\mysqld.exe" -ArgumentList "--defaults-file=C:\\xampp\\mysql\\bin\\my.ini","--standalone" -WindowStyle Hidden; Start-Sleep -Seconds 6; $r = \(Test-NetConnection -ComputerName 127.0.0.1 -Port 3306 -WarningAction SilentlyContinue\).TcpTestSucceeded; Write-Output "PORT3306_OPEN=$r"; Get-Process mysqld -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Name,Id)
PowerShell(php artisan storage:link; Write-Output "---BUILD---"; $npm = "C:\\Program Files\\nodejs\\npm.cmd"; & $npm run build 2>&1 | Select-Object -Last 30; Write-Output "EXIT=$LASTEXITCODE")
PowerShell($env:PATH = "C:\\Program Files\\nodejs;" + $env:PATH; npm run build 2>&1 | Select-Object -Last 25; Write-Output "EXIT=$LASTEXITCODE")

PowerShell($mysql = \(Test-NetConnection -ComputerName 127.0.0.1 -Port 3306 -WarningAction SilentlyContinue\).TcpTestSucceeded; Write-Output "MYSQL_3306=$mysql"; $web = \(Test-NetConnection -ComputerName 127.0.0.1 -Port 8000 -WarningAction SilentlyContinue\).TcpTestSucceeded; Write-Output "WEB_8000=$web"; Get-Process mysqld,php -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Name,Id)

Bash(F="/c/Users/Nflmch/Downloads/sevg8373_csa_erpdb1.sql"; echo "=== Ukuran file ==="; ls -lh "$F" | awk '{print $5}'; echo ""; echo "=== Header \(20 baris pertama\) ==="; head -20 "$F"; echo ""; echo "=== Ada CREATE DATABASE / USE? ==="; grep -iE "CREATE DATABASE|^USE |^USE\\`" "$F" | head; echo ""; echo "=== Charset/collation ==="; grep -ioE "CHARSET=[a-z0-9_]+|COLLATE=[a-z0-9_]+" "$F" | sort | uniq -c | head)
